name: vlm-atlas-blob-organic
description: VLM oracle: verify 12-Sphere Blob renders as organic smooth shape

checkpoints.name: front-organic
checkpoints.description: A 3D rendered organic blobby shape against a dark background. The shape should appear smooth and rounded, like a cluster of merged spheres forming one continuous blob. It should have a blue/cool-toned material with smooth shading and no sharp edges. The silhouette should be irregular and organic — not a perfect sphere, not a box. The surface normals should create smooth shading gradients without hard discontinuities or visible grid/voxel artifacts.

checkpoints.name: side-silhouette
checkpoints.description: Side view of the organic blob. The silhouette should be bumpy and irregular — showing merged lobes from the constituent spheres. The surface should be smooth (no brick-edge artifacts or grid lines). The blob should be roughly centered in the viewport and occupy a substantial portion of the frame. Material should be blue/cool-toned.
